56736.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
56736.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

56737.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
56737.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

56738.title: Forever 80s
56738.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

56739.title: 40 No Solo: Only 80s Groups!
56739.description: We've gone through all of our favourite hits and have selected 40 of the best tracks from some of the biggest groups of the 80s! Enjoy!

56741.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
56741.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!

56742.title: ... So 80s!
56742.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
